name: friction tracker tags hook events with severity (block vs warn) so dashboards can separate hard vs soft friction
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-block --hook x --decision deny --severity block --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-warn --hook y --decision soft --severity warn --at 2026-05-13T00:00:01Z 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'severity=block' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'severity=warn' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
